claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: This is not a molecular reaction dynamics solution, not a quantum advantage claim, not a BQP separation, and not a positive same-access B3 route.
claim_boundary.what_is_supported: B3 has row-aligned denominator pressure, grouped covariance, derivative propagation, and a one-row compiled covariance pilot, but the same-access measurement rescue fails.

gates.label: Same molecule rows exist across grouped covariance, derivative, pressure, and FCI tables
gates.required_next: Keep all future rescue attempts row-aligned across B3 and B10 denominator artifacts.

gates.label: Grouped covariance is represented rather than independent-term-only measurement
gates.required_next: Retain grouped covariance and compare against non-QWC or classical-shadow style alternatives.

gates.label: Derivative-level observable error propagation is included
gates.required_next: Keep derivative error propagation inside every positive-route cost ledger.

gates.label: Compiled-state covariance pilot exists
gates.required_next: Extend the compiled-state covariance from one pilot row to all reaction rows.

gates.label: Full cross-molecule compiled-state covariance exists
gates.required_next: Compute full compiled-state covariance or a stronger bounded substitute for every molecule.

gates.label: Multi-parameter or converged chemistry ansatz exists
gates.required_next: Move beyond the one-parameter UCC double seed and record convergence evidence.

gates.label: Selected-CI/FCI larger-basis denominator is beaten
gates.required_next: Produce at least one same-access denominator win after measurement, derivative, and optimizer costs.

gates.label: Optimizer-loop budget is below the positive-route stress ceiling
gates.required_next: Reduce optimizer-loop shots by at least three orders of magnitude before reopening a positive claim.

gates.label: B10 access contract allows a current B3 sampling bridge
gates.required_next: Replace the current B3 sampling bridge with a same-access route that B10 no longer rejects.

gates.evidence: B3 grouped/derivative/cross advantage claims=False/False/False; B10 advantage/BQP=False/False
gates.label: Forbidden claims remain absent
gates.required_next: Keep forbidden claims absent until a same-access denominator win and theorem boundary exist.

next_required_artifacts: full cross-molecule compiled-state covariance or stronger measurement estimator
multi-parameter converged UCC/ADAPT/VQE or alternative chemistry state-prep evidence
same-access denominator win after derivative and optimizer-loop costs
B10 access-contract update showing the B3 sampling bridge is no longer refuted
title: B3/B10 Same-Access Measurement Rescue Gate
